svg.title: PI Agent — Core Data Model
svg.desc: Hub-and-cluster entity model with MATTER at the center, connected to tenancy, intake, corpus, extracted facts, provenance, human elections and drafting artifacts, and platform clusters. Extracted facts, human elections, and derived artifacts live in separate tables; STRATEGY_PLAN and DEMAND_DRAFT bind to a registry version.
svg.text: MATTER is the hub; extracted facts, human elections, and derived artifacts stay separate.
